description:
Wire TodoService into the server and expose via REST API and MCP tools.

**Routes** (`apps/server/src/routes/todo/index.ts`):
Create a createTodoRoutes function following the same pattern as notes routes. 8 POST endpoints on the todo router:
- list — list all lists (returns lists with item counts)
- get — get single list with all items { projectPath, listId }
- create-list — create new list { projectPath, name, ownerType? }
- delete-list — delete list { projectPath, listId }
- add-item — add item { projectPath, listId, title, description?, priority?, dueDate?, linkedFeatureId? }
- update-item — update item { projectPath, listId, itemId, ...updates }
- delete-item — delete item { projectPath, listId, itemId }
- reorder — reorder items { projectPath, listId, itemIds }
- Use validatePathParams middleware for projectPath

**Server wiring:**
- Instantiate TodoService in `apps/server/src/server/services.ts`
- Mount todo routes in `apps/server/src/server/routes.ts`

**MCP Tools** (`packages/mcp-server/src/tools/todo-tools.ts`):
- create_todo_list — projectPath, name, ownerType (default 'shared')
- list_todo_lists — projectPath (returns lists with item counts and completion %)
- add_todo_item — projectPath, listId, title, description?, priority?, dueDate?, linkedFeatureId?
- update_todo_item — projectPath, listId, itemId, title?, description?, completed?, priority?, dueDate?
- complete_todo_item — projectPath, listId, itemId (shortcut)
- delete_todo_item — projectPath, listId, itemId
- Wire into packages/mcp-server/src/tools/index.ts
- Follow the pattern from workspace-tools.ts and calendar-tools.ts

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/routes/todo/index.ts (new)
- apps/server/src/server/routes.ts
- apps/server/src/server/services.ts
- packages/mcp-server/src/tools/todo-tools.ts (new)
- packages/mcp-server/src/tools/index.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 8 REST endpoints work and return correct responses
- [ ] All 6 MCP tools registered and callable
- [ ] validatePathParams enforced on all routes
- [ ] Error handling returns proper 400/404/500 responses
- [ ] Build passes (server + mcp-server)
